creator: loic.blot@unix-experience.fr
text:
Created attachment 148028
Update rainloop 1.6.9 to 1.6.10

Hi,
there is a new rainloop release with some bugfixes:

    Code refactoring & fixes
    Added Swedish and Lithuanian translations
    Fixed ownCloud encode/decode password function
    browserify -> webpack
    Fixed popup message styles (#278)
    Fix local storage (#303)

Can you update it ?

Thanks
